query: 最新两个季度规模增长最快的主动权益基金前10

args.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '主动权益' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), previous_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '主动权益' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), size_change AS (SELECT l.fund_code, l.fund_name, l.fund_company, l.asset_type, l.fund_size AS latest_size, p.fund_size AS previous_size, (l.fund_size - p.fund_size) AS size_diff FROM latest_size l LEFT JOIN previous_size p ON l.fund_code = p.fund_code), top_growth AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, size_diff FROM size_change ORDER BY size_diff DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT fund_code AS "基金代码", fund_name AS "基金名称", fund_company AS "基金公司", asset_type AS "资产类型", size_diff AS "规模增长" FROM top_growth LIMIT 10

plan.rationale: 通过比较最新一期和前一期的基金规模，计算规模变化，筛选出增长最快的前10只主动权益基金

notes: 未指定日期，使用 fund_size 最新数据
通过比较最新一期和前一期的基金规模，计算规模变化，筛选出增长最快的前10只主动权益基金
SQL 由 LLM/规则生成，并经过只读白名单校验和 dry run。

metadata.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '主动权益' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), previous_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '主动权益' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), size_change AS (SELECT l.fund_code, l.fund_name, l.fund_company, l.asset_type, l.fund_size AS latest_size, p.fund_size AS previous_size, (l.fund_size - p.fund_size) AS size_diff FROM latest_size l LEFT JOIN previous_size p ON l.fund_code = p.fund_code), top_growth AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, size_diff FROM size_change ORDER BY size_diff DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT fund_code AS "基金代码", fund_name AS "基金名称", fund_company AS "基金公司", asset_type AS "资产类型", size_diff AS "规模增长" FROM top_growth LIMIT 10

args.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '主动权益' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), previous_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '主动权益' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 200), size_change AS (SELECT l.fund_code, l.fund_name, l.fund_company, l.asset_type, l.fund_size AS latest_size, p.fund_size AS previous_size, l.date AS latest_date, p.date AS previous_date, (l.fund_size - p.fund_size) AS size_diff FROM latest_size l LEFT JOIN previous_size p ON l.fund_code = p.fund_code WHERE p.date < l.date), growth_ranking AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, latest_size, previous_size, size_diff, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY size_diff DESC) AS rank FROM size_change) SELECT fund_code AS "基金代码", fund_name AS "基金名称", fund_company AS "基金公司", asset_type AS "资产类型", latest_size AS "最新规模", previous_size AS "上期规模", size_diff AS "规模增长" FROM growth_ranking WHERE rank <= 10 LIMIT 10
